title: hieracium detruncatum
intro: Hieracium detruncatum, also known as Hawkweed or Mouse-ear Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. It is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent qualities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. Hieracium detruncatum can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
